titleStmt.title: SII 22.291: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 291. (A.R. No. 291 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—21st YEAR (A.D. 1032-33)

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Tirumaṇṇi Vaḷara etc. It is incomplete towards the end. It states that the Sabhā of Puduppākkam in Puriśaināḍu a division of Manaiyil-kōṭṭam had sold as tax free dēvadāna, 2750 kuḻi of land to the temple of Tirumālpēruḍaiyār in Valla nāḍu a division of Dāmarkōṭṭam for 30 kaḻañju (of gold), but the sale had been in abeyance without being executed till the 21st year of the king. In this year Nīḍūr Karumāṇikkam a lady attached to the royal household donated 10 kaḻañju and 8 mañjāḍi to the temple for which, after making a fore-head plate for the god, 1000 kuḻi of the land was set apart for burning a perpetual lamp with the produce thereon. For another 10 kaḻañju and 9 mañjāḍi donated by one Pugaḻaṟai of Marudattūr in Tiruvālināḍu a division of Rājēndrasiṁha-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam, 1000 more kuḻi of the same land was assigned for a second perpetual lamp to be burnt in front of the god after making a similar tiruppaṭṭam (fore-head plate) like the one mentioned above for the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumanni vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyum cirttanic celviyum tan perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai nāṭu ntuṭarvana velippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻat taraiyartamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻiṉ muṭiyu munnavarpakkaṟ tennavar vaitta cun=taramuṭiyu min=tira nāramu n=teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatu meṟipaṭai keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kula taṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāvaṟp palapaḻan=tivum ceruviṟciṉavi Irupattoru kālaraicukaḷaik kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ cākara tivaraṇ karuti yiruttiya cempoṟ ṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ perum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navaṉetik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakkoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavallai matiramaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭai vaḷai nāmaṇai koṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷi yum pācaṭai paḻaṉ mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti yātinakaravaiyil can=tiraṉ tolkulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭiccu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikula taṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimuḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurarceṟ naṟkocalai nāṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻiccu vaṇṭuṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟat tākki tikkaṉaikkirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkoṭṭal mayipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaru
ḷi Oṇṭiṟalāṉaiyum peṇṭirpaṇṭāramum nittil neṭuṅkaṭaluttaralāṭamum veṟimalar tirttat teṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavijayatuṅkapaṉmaṉākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayam porukaṭal kumpak kariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉ Aṉṉakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttoḻil puṉamaṇi putavamum kaṉamaṇi katavamum niṟai śrī vijaiyamum tuṟainirpaṉṉaiyum paṉmalaiyuṟaiyil toṉ malaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkā cokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevili paṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmutir kaṭun=tiṟal Ilāmuritecamum teṉkaṭalārva māṉakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraḷkaṭāramum māperun=taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa koparakesari panmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājentracoḷadevarkku yā[ ṇṭu 2 10 1Āvatu] jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tāmarkkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu tirumālpeṟṟu tirumālpeṟuṭaiyār Ātidāsacaṇḍeśvararpakkal maṇaiyil koṭṭattu puricaināṭṭu putupākkattu sabhai yom taṉ cāy koṇṭa poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻañcum koṇṭu Iṟaiyili devatāṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai piṭāriyār nilattukku meṟkku teṉpāṟkkellai kollaiviḻunta nilamākavum melpārkkellai pakavatipaṭṭikkum koyilāṉ nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai nampikāl
kkaraikku teṟkum Iṉāṉkellaiyuḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam moḻiviṉṟi Iraṇṭāyirattu Eḻuṉūṟṟu Aimpatu kuḻiyum Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu cilālekai ceytu kuṭuttom sabhaiyom paṇiyāl Ivvūr madhyastaṉ kecavaṉ mālirumcolai Eḻuttu Eṉṟu viṟṟuttanta nilattukku yāṇṭu Irupat toṉṟāvatu varaiyum nivan=tam ceyyātu kiṭan=tamaiyil Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra coḻatevaṉ periyaveḷattu peṇṭāṭṭi ṉiṭur karumāṇikkam tirunon=tā viḷakku Oṉṟu can=tirātityaval Erikkavaitta poṉ kācukallāl tuḷaipoṉ poṉ patiṉkaḻañce Eṭṭu mañcāṭiyum koṇṭu tiruppaṭṭam Oṉṟu ceytu cātti Ittiru nontāviḷakku Oṉṟukku pākkattu vilaikoṇṭu kiṭanta nilattil tirunontā viḷakku 1- Oṉṟukku Āyiraṅkuḻi caṇḍeśvaravilaiyāka Inta Āyiraṅkuḻiyilum van=ta svāmipokaṅkoṇṭu can=tirātityaval Oru tirunon=tāviḷakkerippatākavum Iti noṭum coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭakarai rājentrasiṅhavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvālināṭṭu marutattūr marutattūruṭaiyāṉ pukaḻaṟai Ampalattil tirumālpeṟuṭaiyārkku valappuṟam Etirniṉṟeriya cantrādityaval viḷakkoṉṟiṉukku vaicca poṉ kācu kallāl tuḷainiṟai patiṉkaḻañce Oṉpatu mañcāṭiyum koṇṭu Irājentracoḻa ṉeṉṟu tiruppaṭṭam cātti Ittirunontā viḷakkoṉṟukku viṭṭa nilamāvatu putup pākkattu sabhaiyom vilaikoṇṭu kiṭan=ta nilattil niṭur karumāṇikkattiṉ viḷakkāl niṅkum nilak kuḻi Āyiram nikki niṉṟa nilattil Ivaṉukku kuḻi Āyiram Innilam Āyirattilum van=ta svāmipokaṅ koṇṭu Ivviḷakkerippatākavum It tirunon=tāviḷakku IraṇStops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
